description: Cloud Storage for Firebase is Firebase’s file storage service for storing and serving user-generated content such as images, video, and other app assets. It is built on Google Cloud Storage and integrates with Firebase projects and security rules.
summary: Firebase exposes a documented Cloud Storage for Firebase REST API; for the firebasestorage.googleapis.com host specifically, I found no separate public OpenAPI/GraphQL/MCP/CLI surface or authoritative authentication mechanics tied to that domain.

surfaces.name: Cloud Storage for Firebase REST API
